title: Pulse Finance Dashboard
description: A financial analytics platform for tracking business performance.
shortDescription: Interactive dashboard with charts, analytics, and financial insights.
fullDescription: Pulse Finance provides companies with real-time financial monitoring tools. It includes revenue tracking, analytics reports, account management, and visual data representation.

title: Luxe Commerce
description: A premium online shopping experience for modern brands.
shortDescription: A luxury e-commerce platform focused on speed and conversion.
fullDescription: Luxe Commerce is a scalable shopping platform featuring product management, secure payments, customer accounts, and optimized checkout experiences.
